query:
-- Rimuovi colonne obsolete
ALTER TABLE weekly_productions 
DROP COLUMN desiredQuantity,
DROP COLUMN unitType,
DROP COLUMN currentStock,
DROP COLUMN status;

-- Aggiungi nuova colonna quantity
ALTER TABLE weekly_productions 
ADD COLUMN quantity DECIMAL(10,3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

-- Modifica enum productionType
ALTER TABLE weekly_productions 
MODIFY COLUMN productionType ENUM('final', 'semifinished') DEFAULT 'final' NOT NULL;
